outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated short-term volatility expected due to negative GEX in 0DTE/Weekly, transitioning to stability in Monthly structure
outlook.summary: Spot at 6612.5 trades significantly above visible option activity (strips 6285-6520). Monthly shows bullish reverse smirk with extreme low PCR (0.03) indicating potential euphoria. Negative near-term GEX amplifies downside risk if support fails. Key ITM call concentrations at 6490-6515 provide structural support zones.

levels.motivazione: Highest 0DTE OI concentration (51+63 at 6510/6515). ITM calls create dealer delta hedging activity zone near spot.
Peak 0DTE open interest (64 OI). Dealers short these ITM calls must buy deltas - creates structural support.
Dominant Weekly OI (100 contracts). Significant structural level but distance from spot reduces immediate relevance.
Highest Monthly volume (47) with elevated IV (27.59%). Marks significant structural interest in Monthly structure.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility due to neutral GEX; expect pinning at resistance levels.
outlook.summary: Market is testing immediate resistance at 24300-24450. Significant multi-expiry resistance overhead at 24500 suggests a cap on upside. Support is distant at 23600.

levels.motivazione: High volume node in both 0DTE and Monthly expiries creating immediate friction above spot.
Dominant 0DTE volume strike acting as the primary intraday ceiling.
Significant volume alignment across all three expiries creating a major structural barrier.
Largest put volume cluster in Monthly expiry defining the structural floor.
